## Summary

Describe the capability you want to add or improve.

## Problem To Solve

Explain the user or operator problem behind this request.

## Proposed Direction

Describe the solution you have in mind.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives or workarounds you considered.

## Community vs Commercial

Tell us whether you believe this belongs in:
- the open-source community baseline
- the commercial layer
- not sure yet

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, examples, or supporting context if helpful.
